Petition To 1) Remove The Trustee(Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Failure To Account). 2) Appoint Successor Trustee. 3) Surcharge Trustee. 4) Request Accounting. 5) Instructions
Off Calendar Jun-03-2026 Continued To Aug-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Wilsom for Richard Wada and Wayne Wada (respondents) (via zoom).
Zach Georgepoulos for Ed Wada (petitioner) (via zoom).

The Court addressed service issues, that Richard Wada needs to be served notices. The matter is continued to August 17, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

Petition To 1) Remove The Trustee(Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Failure To Account). 2) Appoint Successor Trustee. 3) Surcharge Trustee. 4) Request Accounting. 5) Instructions

Petition To 1) Remove The Trustee(Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Failure To Account). 2) Appoint Successor Trustee. 3) Surcharge Trustee. 4) Request Accounting. 5) Instructions
Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Continued To May-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Zach Georgopoulus appeared via zoom for Ed Wada (petitioner).
Thomas Wilson appeared via zoom for Richard Wada and Wayne Wada (respondents).

Discussion was held regarding the procedural issues, that the jurisdiction and venue is proper in San Francisco since the real property is in San Francisco, and that currently there is clean up underway to the real property to be listed and put on the market for sale.

The matter is continued to May 18, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Parties to file a joint status report 5 days prior to the hearing.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Obi. Not reported.
